evals.prompt: I already have an open thread about Robot Debugging. Please add this rough note to it: Billy retested Rover 3 and still saw CAN bus dropouts.
evals.expected_output: The related open thread is selected, a raw snippet is appended with capture_note.py, the thread-local prose is updated directly, and sync_thread_state.py is used afterward.
assertions: The workflow appends to an existing related thread rather than creating a new thread
The raw note is captured before semantic edits
The thread-local summary and open questions are edited directly by the agent
sync_thread_state.py is run after the direct edit

evals.prompt: I have two open threads that might both match this note. Add: vendor asked for revised quote and CAN test status update.
evals.expected_output: The agent recognizes the routing ambiguity and asks before choosing a thread rather than guessing.
assertions: The skill does not silently choose between multiple plausible open threads
The response asks for clarification before capture continues
